tagline: Short clips to help you work smarter in the field

videos.title: AI writes your work summary for you
videos.caption: Tap Generate and Titan Intelligence builds a clear summary from your work logs in seconds — no typing.

videos.title: Let the customer sign from their own phone
videos.caption: Tap Share → Email or Text → they get a link and sign on their own screen. No handing over your device.

videos.title: Collect a deposit before you leave the job
videos.caption: After Perform Work Later, tap Collect Deposit. Pick a % or custom amount — it auto-carries to the follow-up invoice.

videos.title: Pro vs. Rookie: closing out an invoice
videos.caption: AI invoice summary + Present = branded paperwork in the customer's inbox before you reach your truck.
